services.headline: Everything You Need to Go Online
services.subhead: From a simple catalogue to a full e-commerce store — we do it all.

items.title: E-Commerce Store
items.description: Full online shop with product listings, cart, payments, and order management. Supports UPI, cards, and COD.

items.title: Product Catalogue
items.description: A beautiful digital menu or product catalogue. Perfect for restaurants, boutiques, and service businesses.

items.title: Google Maps & Local SEO
items.description: Get found on Google Maps. We optimize your listing and build local search presence.

items.title: WhatsApp Integration
items.description: Let customers order directly on WhatsApp. Auto-reply, product sharing, and order confirmation.

items.title: Social Media Setup
items.description: Instagram, Facebook, and Google Ads pages configured and linked to your online store.

items.title: AI Chatbot
items.description: 24/7 customer support chatbot that answers FAQs, takes orders, and collects leads automatically.

items.title: Monthly Maintenance
items.description: Keep your store running smoothly. Product updates, security patches, backups, and priority support.

items.title: Analytics & Reports
items.description: Understand your customers. Sales reports, visitor insights, and conversion tracking.

howItWorks.headline: From Meeting to Live Store in 7 Days

steps.title: Fill the Form
steps.desc: Tell us about your shop, requirements, and budget. Takes 5 minutes.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.desc: We call you within 24 hours to understand your vision and finalize the plan.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.desc: Our team designs your store. You get a preview link to review before launch.

steps.title: Review & Revise
steps.desc: Two rounds of free revisions. We refine until you're 100% happy.

steps.title: Go Live!
steps.desc: Your store launches. We train you to manage it and handle orders.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.desc: We're here. Updates, issues, new features — just message us anytime.

testimonials.name: Priya Mehta
testimonials.text: I had no idea how to go online. The ShopOnline team set everything up in 5 days. Now I get orders from all over Gujarat! My sales doubled in the first month.

testimonials.name: Raj Kumar
testimonials.text: Very professional team. They understood exactly what I needed. The WhatsApp integration is incredible — customers just message and order. Game changer.

testimonials.name: Sunita Joshi
testimonials.text: My tiffin service was word-of-mouth only. Now I have a proper website with online orders. The chatbot handles enquiries while I cook! Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Aditya Shah
testimonials.text: SEO improved so much after the website launch. We now rank on Google for local searches. The team also helped with Facebook ads. Worth every rupee.

testimonials.name: Meena Reddy
testimonials.text: Beautiful website! The portfolio section showcases my arrangements so well. Festival season orders increased by 180%. Amazing value for the price.

testimonials.name: Vikram Patel
testimonials.text: The appointment booking system saves us so much time. Patients can book 24/7 and get reminders. Professional website that builds trust instantly.

about.headline: We're on a Mission to Digitize India's Local Economy
about.story:
ShopOnline was founded in 2022 by a team of designers and developers who grew up watching their family's local shops struggle to compete with big e-commerce giants. We realized that local shop owners had amazing products and loyal customers — they just lacked an online presence.

So we built a service that makes going online as simple as a WhatsApp message. No technical knowledge required. No months of waiting. Just a beautiful, functional online store, ready in 7 days.

team.name: Arjun Desai
team.bio: Full-stack developer with 8 years experience. Built 200+ websites.

team.name: Kavya Shah
team.bio: Designer specializing in e-commerce and conversion optimization.

team.name: Rohan Patel
team.bio: SEO and social media expert. Helped 50+ local businesses rank on Google.

team.name: Priti Nair
team.bio: Ensures every client is trained, supported, and happy with their store.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Shop
contact.subhead: We're real people. Reach us on WhatsApp for the fastest response.

faq.q: How long does it take to build my store?
faq.a: Most stores are ready within 5–7 working days after we receive all your content (product photos, descriptions, etc.).

faq.q: Do I need to provide product photos?
faq.a: Yes, but we can guide you on how to take good photos with your phone. We also offer basic photo editing included.

faq.q: What happens after the site launches?
faq.a: All plans include post-launch support. Starter gets 1 month, Growth gets 3 months, and Pro includes ongoing monthly maintenance.

faq.q: Can I update the website myself?
faq.a: Yes! We provide a simple admin panel and training. Or you can WhatsApp us updates at any time.

faq.q: Do you work with all types of shops?
faq.a: Absolutely. We've built stores for clothing, food, electronics, healthcare, education, agriculture, and much more.

faq.q: Is payment secure on my store?
faq.a: Yes. We integrate Razorpay or Cashfree — trusted, PCI-compliant payment gateways used by millions of Indian businesses.
